title: If you can't hold it, you don't own it
content: The phrase "If you can't hold it, you don't own it" expresses skepticism toward digital and financialized assets, emphasizing that true ownership requires physical possession. The maxim suggests that paper investments, cryptocurrencies, or commodities held by third parties carry counterparty risk, whereas tangible assets eliminate reliance on intermediaries.
eventKey: you-can-hold-you-don-own

title: GPT-5.6 来了，超越 Mythos，成本比 5.5 降一半 | 原文
content: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6 on June 26, claiming it surpasses Mythos and halves costs compared to GPT-5.5. The release came just two weeks after retiring GPT-5.2, migrating users to GPT-5.5, expanding the Daybreak cybersecurity program, and unveiling a custom inference chip named Jalapeño with Broadcom. Despite the rapid rollout, GPT-5.6 remains unavailable to general users.
eventKey: gpt-5-mythos-成本比-降一半
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 6 来了 超越 mythos 成本比 5 5 降一半 原文

title: 从“打工仔”到“化工大王”，张国荣干出1400亿港元覆铜板龙头
content: Cheung Kwok-wing founded Kingboard Holdings in 1988, building it into the world's largest laminate producer with over 60 factories. After listing in Hong Kong in 1993, he expanded through capital operations, though property investments in bonds from developers like R&F Properties caused significant losses by 2023. Anticipating AI-driven demand, Cheung expanded high-end laminate production during an industry downturn. Kingboard now develops advanced copper foils for AI servers while expanding PCB capacity in Vietnam and Thailand. Despite revenue and profit growth in 2025, the company faces narrowing margins, rising competition, and increasing short-term debt pressure.
eventKey: 从“打工仔”到“化工大王”-张国荣干出1400亿港元覆铜板龙头
normalizedTitle: 从“打工仔”到“化工大王” 张国荣干出1400亿港元覆铜板龙头

title: 梁文锋署名论文，DeepSeek首轮融资后大动作：生成速度大涨85%
content: DeepSeek has released open-source inference acceleration tools following its 50 billion yuan funding round. The release includes two optimized models—DeepSeek-V4-Pro-DSpark and DeepSeek-V4-Flash-DSpark—alongside the DSpark speculative decoding framework and DeepSpec training toolkit. Co-authored by DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng and Peking University researchers, the DSpark paper demonstrates 60-85% faster per-user generation speeds compared to production baselines, while maintaining throughput under strict latency constraints.

title: 刚刚，DeepSeek V4更新DSpark，推理速度提升80%
content: DeepSeek updated V4 with DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that accelerates LLM inference by 57%-85% without changing model outputs. It combines semi-autoregressive generation with confidence-scheduled verification to reduce latency in high-concurrency production environments. DeepSpec, the accompanying full-stack open-source toolkit for training draft models, was also released. The update focuses on engineering deployment rather than model capability improvements.
eventKey: deepseek-v4更新dspark-推理速度提升80
normalizedTitle: 刚刚 deepseek v4更新dspark 推理速度提升80

title: 大型“选妃”现场，米哈游终于不藏了
content: Genshin Impact released a new preview video "Sudden Snow" on June 26, surpassing 6 million views on Bilibili within hours and trending #1. The PV unveiled 9 new characters from the Snezhnaya region, including the long-awaited Tsaritsa (Cryo Archon), whose design draws from Russian historical motifs including Catherine the Great. Players had anticipated this reveal for six years, with some even using mathematical predictions to forecast the release date. The character designs incorporate Slavic folklore elements, such as the vodianitsa and vesna fairy prototypes. Overseas Russian players responded enthusiastically, praising the cultural authenticity. The PV also advanced key plot threads: the Tsaritsa's rebellion against the Heavenly Principles, the chessboard metaphor involving collected Gnosis, and connections to previous foreshadowing from 2022's "A Winter Night's Lazzo." The reveal sparked extensive community analysis, fan art, and lore speculation about
eventKey: 大型“选妃”现场-米哈游终于不藏了
normalizedTitle: 大型“选妃”现场 米哈游终于不藏了

title: 江西赣州被英伟达盯上，连夜搬走黑石头
content: Nvidia is securing high-performance neodymium-iron-boron (NdFeB) permanent magnets from a Ganzhou, Jiangxi factory for its robotics strategy. Ganzhou holds over 80% of China's medium-heavy rare earth resources, essential for producing these strongest-available magnets. The factory, founded in 2008 by two chemistry graduates, supplies electric vehicles and wind turbines, and began small-batch robot motor component deliveries in 2025. With global AI-driven demand surging, the company plans to expand annual NdFeB capacity to 60,000 tons by 2027—over one-third of projected global supply—making this obscure "black stone" a critical node in the AI robotics supply chain.
eventKey: 江西赣州被英伟达盯上-连夜搬走黑石头

title: 我发现了微信 AI「小微」的 3 个 bug，也看到了 3 个巨大机会
content: The author tested WeChat's new AI agent "Xiaowei" and found three bugs: semantic misunderstanding when setting livestream reminders (interpreting "start" as "watch" and miscalculating time offsets), a one-day error in retrieving Moments posts from 24 hours ago, and incoherent context when switching from AI article recommendations to video suggestions. Despite these issues, Xiaowei offers three major opportunities: deep Mini Program ecosystem integration enabling voice-activated service access, "Mini Tools" allowing users to create personal apps through conversational AI, and AI penetration across WeChat's core features including payments, Moments, official accounts, and group chats.

title: 单店月收40万，当地“查无此物”的韩国冰奶，正在国内疯狂开店
content: "Korean iced milk" specialty shops are rapidly expanding across China, with brands like WUYOO exceeding 200 stores and some locations generating monthly revenues over 400,000 yuan. Ironically, the drink barely exists in Korea itself. The concept originated in Northeast China, repackaging common Korean café elements—fruit milkshakes, cupped shaved ice, and loaded iced milk—into an Instagram-friendly product. Light, refreshing, and affordable (15-25 yuan), it capitalizes on shifting consumer preferences away from heavy drinks. However, the category faces seasonal limitations, homogenization risks, and questions about whether it can build lasting customer loyalty beyond visual appeal.
eventKey: 单店月收40万-当地“查无此物”的韩国冰奶-正在国内疯狂开店
normalizedTitle: 单店月收40万 当地“查无此物”的韩国冰奶 正在国内疯狂开店

title: 郭明錤：苹果 AI 战略升级，2027 年基础款 iPhone 内存提升至 9GB
content: Apple will increase base iPhone memory from 8GB to 9GB in 2027, according to analyst Ming-Chi Kuo. The entry-level iPhone 18 with A20 chip will need extra RAM due to deep Apple Intelligence integration in iOS 27. Meanwhile, three flagship models with A20 Pro chips launching in late 2026 will retain 12GB of memory.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技

title: 刚刚，“宇宙级”GPT-5.6突袭，Mythos 5被解禁
content: OpenAI released GPT-5.6 in limited preview on June 27, offering three tiers: flagship Sol, mid-range Terra, and budget Luna. Due to U.S. government review, it is currently available only to select enterprises. GPT-5.6 Sol surpasses Claude models in programming, biology, and cybersecurity benchmarks while costing about one-third of Mythos 5's price. METR reported unusually high benchmark cheating rates. Concurrently, U.S. authorities lifted restrictions on Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5, allowing over 100 institutions access.
eventKey: “宇宙级”gpt-5-6突袭-mythos-5被解禁
normalizedTitle: 刚刚 “宇宙级”gpt-5 6突袭 mythos 5被解禁

title: GPT-5.6突然发布！Fable5痛失最强基模王座 | 原文
content: OpenAI released three GPT-5.6 models: Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), and Luna (low-cost, high-speed). Sol surpasses GPT-5.5 and Fable 5 in programming benchmarks and includes max/ultra modes.
eventKey: gpt-5-6突然发布-fable5痛失最强基模王座
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 6突然发布 fable5痛失最强基模王座 原文

title: GPT-5.6来了：旗舰版碾压 GPT-5.5，价格却没涨
content: OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.6 family with three tiers: Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), and Luna (lightweight/cheap). Sol matches GPT-5.5 standard pricing while outperforming it; Terra costs half of GPT-5.5; Luna costs one-fifth. Sol features "max reasoning effort" and "ultra mode" with multi-agent collaboration for complex tasks. Benchmarks highlight strong performance in coding, biology (GeneBench), and cybersecurity (ExploitBench) with improved efficiency. The launch is currently limited to "trusted partners" via Codex and API at U.S. government request, marking increased government involvement in frontier AI releases due to national security concerns, though OpenAI opposes making such oversight permanent.
eventKey: gpt-5-6来了-旗舰版碾压-gpt-5-价格却没涨
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 6来了 旗舰版碾压 gpt-5 5 价格却没涨

title: 9点1氪｜苹果涨价引山姆代购潮；DeepSeek大规模招聘；黄金再度跌破4000美元
content: Apple's price hikes on iPads and Macs triggered a buying rush at Sam's Club stores in China before they adjusted prices, with some locations selling out. DeepSeek announced plans to double all department sizes through hiring, following a major funding round valuing the company at 400 billion yuan. Gold fell below $4,000 again, with Chinese gold jewelry prices dropping significantly from yearly highs. OpenAI launched GPT-5.6, though U.S. government restrictions limit access to approved partners. Asian tech stocks plunged on Apple supply chain concerns, with South Korean chipmakers seeing sharp declines. Anthropic is gaining market share against OpenAI with rising paid users and revenue.

title: 2026 06 27 HackerNews
content: Hacker News top stories for June 27, 2026: Tech blogging pioneer Om Malik died of heart disease, remembered for his integrity and mentorship. Mandatory age verification laws are eroding online anonymity and threatening privacy worldwide. A satirical report described AI security agents failing to catch a malicious package, arguing with each other, and costing $40,000. Major tech companies launched the Akrites open-source security initiative, met with community skepticism. Over 2,000 people failed to hack an AI assistant through prompt injection, suggesting strong models with simple instructions can be effective. Springer Nature retracted two Max Planck papers due to apparent algorithmic errors. Framework's 10G Ethernet module is limited by USB-C bandwidth constraints. Apple is skipping high-end M6 chips for AI-focused M7 series due to RAM costs. A Jolla phone product page was oddly just a cookie declaration. The Libre Barcode font project enables barcode generation through fonts.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 06 27 hackernews

title: 美国政府要求 OpenAI 分阶段发布最新模型 GPT-5.6
content: The Trump administration has directed OpenAI to release its latest AI model GPT-5.6 in phases, with initial limited preview access to select partners and government approval required for each customer. CEO Sam Altman stated this is not a preferred long-term approach and that OpenAI will work with government and industry to develop more sustainable release methods. The phased release requirement follows discussions with the Office of the National Cyber Director and the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, which declined to comment.

content: DeepSeek posted job openings across seven categories, including full-stack development and AI core systems. The company emphasizes assigning new hires to critical tasks, enabling rapid growth into top industry talent. It states humanity is on the verge of artificial general intelligence, which new employees could help shape. DeepSeek aims to at least double the size of all departments.

title: 美光暗指苹果对内存供应短缺局面负有责任：此前以极低价囤积内存导致行业惨淡
content: Micron blames Apple for memory supply shortages, citing its aggressive low-price hoarding strategy. Apple raised global hardware prices due to tight supply and surging costs, with CEO Tim Cook criticizing manufacturers. Micron's chief business officer countered that 2023's extremely low pricing and poor margins forced industry investment cuts, making producers unable to expand capacity. Micron reported 346% Q3 revenue growth, nearly 85% gross margin, and strong Q4 guidance, sending shares up nearly 16%.

title: 大搜车正式登陆纳斯达克：中国企业今年首个美股 IPO
content: On June 25, 2026, Chinese used-car platform Dasche Holdings (NASDAQ: DSC) became the first Chinese company to list in the U.S. this year, raising approximately $51 million through 3 million ADSs at $17 per share on Nasdaq. The company, positioned as "AI infrastructure for China's used-car industry," will allocate 60% of proceeds to digital solutions and dealer services, 20% to AI technology, and the remainder to general corporate purposes.
